metadata.description: AI Suggestion Lifecycle (Issue #36): engagement-specific suggestions derived from walkthrough activity. Suggested → Reviewed → Approved → Applied.
metadata.source: Simulated — Release 2 AI agents author these; Release 1 seeds representative suggestions for the lifecycle UI.

suggestions.title: Add a change-management evidence checklist item to the Quanta Capture NG agenda
suggestions.description: The May 6 walkthrough surfaced a change ticket export as the missing evidence for REQ-MER-0026. Add an explicit evidence checklist item so the next session captures it without a follow-up request.

comments.author: Priya Raman
comments.text: Agreed — this would have avoided the follow-up email.

recommendations: Add 'Change ticket export for REQ-MER-0026' to the evidence expected list.

suggestions.title: Flag REQ-MER-0512 for a dedicated call before the next Quanta Capture NG session
suggestions.description: Tobias Whitmore's discussion topic (REQ-MER-0512) has been open since June 10 with no scheduled call. Recommend a dedicated 15-minute slot ahead of the next recurring session.

comments.author: Priya Raman
comments.text: Recommending we bundle this with the July 21 session instead of a separate call.

recommendations: Add a 15-minute agenda item for REQ-MER-0512 to the July 21 session.

suggestions.title: Schedule a Zephyr Platform kickoff before the next reporting cycle
suggestions.description: Zephyr Platform Team has no completed sessions yet and the engagement's audit period closes 2025-12-31. Recommend confirming the kickoff date already proposed (2026-07-28) is locked in.
recommendations: Confirm the July 28 kickoff with the Zephyr Platform Team's main POC.
